domain: Akan/Asante Adinkra symbols (Ghana ~122 canonical visual symbols each paired with a Twi proverb; semantic-layout system; symbol-proverb sentence shorthand)
specific_mechanism: Fixed canonical-symbol memory bank: K=128 learned concept-vectors C = (c_1..c_K) each paired with a proverb-retrieval token p_i. During inference, attention probe q = Q · h_token routes via softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) to retrieve top-k canonical symbol-proverb pairs which are appended to the context as proverb-tokens. Catalog is small (K=128) and FROZEN — not part of base model weights.
llm_application: ADINKRA-CATALOG: a small FIXED canonical-symbol memory bank with paired proverb-retrieval tokens. (1) Maintain K=128 learned concept-vectors C ∈ R^{K×d}, each paired with a proverb-token id p_i ∈ V_proverb; (2) at inference compute attention probe q from current hidden state; (3) score = softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)); (4) retrieve top-k symbols, append their proverb-tokens to context for self-augmentation; (5) catalog is frozen, only the attention-probe projection W_q is trained. Differs from RAG (variable-passage retrieval, not fixed canonical catalog), A-MEM 2502.12110 (agentic memory with structured attributes + embedding, not fixed canonical), Vector DB Survey 2402.01763 (general vector retrieval), AI-Memory Knowledge Base (broad memory landscape). Differs from R408 ICELANDIC-CHAIN (provenance audit chain) by FIXED CANONICAL catalog + paired-token retrieval; from R428 BOMA-RING-KV (concentric KV-cache priority) by symbol-catalog-vector vs KV-token.
novelty_claim: Vector-store RAG + agentic memory + concept-vector retrieval cover the design space. ADINKRA-CATALOG adds FIXED K=128 canonical symbol bank + paired-proverb-retrieval-token specialization. Recombination — canonical retrieval is mainstream RAG flavor.
